title: Tool Use & Function Calling
description: Giving agents the ability to act on the world through tools, APIs, and the Model Context Protocol

lessons.title: Why Tools Matter
lessons.description: How tool use transforms LLMs from knowledge engines into action-taking agents

lessons.title: Function Calling Basics
lessons.description: How LLMs select and invoke functions: schemas, parameters, and responses

lessons.title: Designing Effective Tool Interfaces
lessons.description: Principles for tool naming, descriptions, and parameter schemas that LLMs use reliably

lessons.title: Error Handling and Retries
lessons.description: Graceful failure: what happens when tools break and how agents recover

lessons.title: Model Context Protocol (MCP)
lessons.description: The open standard for connecting agents to tools, data, and services

lessons.title: Building MCP Servers
lessons.description: Create your own MCP server to expose custom tools and resources

lessons.title: Tool Use Lab
lessons.description: Hands-on: build an agent that searches the web, reads files, and calls APIs
